content.problemStatement:
Read problem statements in RussianYou are given a sequence of 16N16N16N positive integers a1,a2,тАж,a16Na_1,a_2,\ldots,a_{16N}a1тАЛ,a2тАЛ,тАж,a16NтАЛ. You may shuffle  this sequence in any way you choose, i.e. change it to any one of its permutations. Then, let
x=(a1тКХa2)тКЧ(a3тКХa4)тКЧтАжтКЧ(a8NтИТ1тКХa8N)тАЙ,x=(a_1 \oplus a_2) \otimes (a_3 \oplus a_4) \otimes \ldots \otimes (a_{8N-1} \oplus a_{8N}) \,,x=(a1тАЛтКХa2тАЛ)тКЧ(a3тАЛтКХa4тАЛ)тКЧтАжтКЧ(a8NтИТ1тАЛтКХa8NтАЛ),
y=(a8N+1тКХa8N+2)тКЧ(a8N+3тКХa8N+4)тКЧтАжтКЧ(a16NтИТ1тКХa16N)тАЙ,y=(a_{8N+1} \oplus a_{8N+2}) \otimes (a_{8N+3} \oplus a_{8N+4}) \otimes \ldots \otimes (a_{16N-1} \oplus a_{16N}) \,,y=(a8N+1тАЛтКХa8N+2тАЛ)тКЧ(a8N+3тАЛтКХa8N+4тАЛ)тКЧтАжтКЧ(a16NтИТ1тАЛтКХa16NтАЛ),

where тКЧ\otimesтКЧ and тКХ\oplusтКХ denote bitwise AND and XOR respectively.

Find the maximum possible value of xтИТyx-yxтИТy.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains 16N16N16N space-separated integers a1,a2,тАж,a16Na_1,a_2,\ldots,a_{16N}a1тАЛ,a2тАЛ,тАж,a16NтАЛ.
content.outputFormat: Print a single line containing one integer тАФ the maximum value of xтИТyx-yxтИТy.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Since 1тКХ1=2тКХ2=01 \oplus 1 = 2 \oplus 2 = 01тКХ1=2тКХ2=0 and 1тКХ2=31 \oplus 2 = 31тКХ2=3, it is easy to see that we should let a1=a3=a5=a7=2a_1=a_3=a_5=a_7=2a1тАЛ=a3тАЛ=a5тАЛ=a7тАЛ=2 and all the remaining elements aia_iaiтАЛ should be 111.
